overview.description: AI-powered e-commerce competitive intelligence platform for price monitoring and product matching
overview.description_long: DeepScout (Algorama, s.r.o.) provides an AI-driven platform that collects competitor data from e-commerce sites—including prices, availability, product details, and assortment—without technical setup. Its unique 5-step AI matching algorithm matches identical products across competitors with 99% precision. The platform delivers actionable insights on pricing and assortment strategy, serving clients across multiple markets.
overview.tagline: Get Your Competition Data in Just a Few Clicks

history.origin_story: Founded by Jan Mittner, entrepreneur and AI engineer, with early backing from Tomáš Hodboď (Miton) as Founding Investor. Supported by the Czech Technologická inkubace (Technology Incubation) program.

key_milestones.event: DeepScout brand and platform publicly launched with 14-day free trial offering
Jan Mittner featured on Cinkátko Podcast discussing competitive pricing

notable_people.name: Tomáš Hodboď
notable_people.note: Partner at Miton; previously led Heureka and founded & scaled Glami

metadata.notes: Legal entity is Algorama, s.r.o. Registered office is in Třebíč, not Prague, but appears in Czech national AI/tech catalog. Company ID: 08751218, VAT ID: CZ08751218. Founding year estimated from company registration number range (~2019). Miton invested via Tomáš Hodboď as Founding Investor. Business model is usage-based (per website + per 1,000 products) with monthly/annual billing options.
